title: Compound switch novelty
summary: Represent whether the current compound is newly observed, repeated, or a return to a previously used compound.
rationale: The dry-compound history block showed value, but a richer current-switch state may better identify active strategy transitions and rule satisfaction.
implementation_hint: Within each driver-race sequence, track previous compound, compounds seen before current row, current is new slick, current is same as previous, current is return to seen compound, and compound-switch-with-current-pit flags.
expected_effect: Small ROC AUC gain with medium confidence.
risk: Needs careful current/past ordering and robust string normalization; rare compound patterns may be sparse.
